zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem於1126年出生在比利時海瑙特艾福雷斯時，她的父親Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES37歲，母親Ada D'ATH11123歲。她於大約1130年與Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1176年在比利時海瑙特吉斯倫吉享年50歲，埋葬在比利時海瑙特阿斯吉斯倫吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem于1126年出生在比利时海瑙特艾福雷斯时，她的父亲Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES37岁，母亲Ada D'ATH11123岁。她于大约1130年与Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1176年在比利时海瑙特吉斯倫吉享年50岁，埋葬在比利时海瑙特阿斯吉斯倫吉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem was born in 1126, in Chièvres, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES, was 37 and her mother, Ada D'ATH, was 11123. She married Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont about 1130. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1176, in Ghislenghien, Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 50, and was buried in Ghislenghien, Ath, Hainaut, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem est née en 1126, à Chièvres, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ada D'ATH, avait 11123 ans. Elle a épousé Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont environ 1130. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1176, à Ghislenghien, Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Ghislenghien, Ath, Hainaut, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem 1126 in Chièvres, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES 37 und ihre Mutter Ada D'ATH 11123. Sie hat um 1130 Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1176 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Ghislenghien, Hennegau, Belgien und wurde in Ghislenghien, Ath, Hennegau, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem è nata il nel 1126 nel Chièvres, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Ada D'ATH, aveva 11123 anni. Lei sposato Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont circa 1130. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1176, nel Ghislenghien, Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Ghislenghien, Ath, Hainaut, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghemが1126年にベルギーヘイナトチevレスで生まれた時，父Guy Widon DE CHIEVRESは37歳，母Ada D'ATHは11123歳であった。約1130年にGilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1176年にベルギーヘイナトギスレンギンで50歳で死去し，ベルギーヘイナトアスギスレンギンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem(이)가 1126년 벨기에 하인오트 치e브레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada D'ATH(은)는 11123세였다. 그녀는 대략 1130년 Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1176년 벨기에 하인오트 그히슬렌그히에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 하인오트 앳h 그히슬렌그히에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem nasceu em 1126, em Chièvres, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Ada D'ATH, tinha 11123 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont aproximadamente 1130. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1176, em Ghislenghien, Hainaut, Bélgica, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Ghislenghien, Ath, Hainaut, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem родилась в 1126 г. в местности чиeвресь, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada D'ATH, 11123. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont около 1130 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1176 г. в местности гисленьхиен, ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности гисленьхиен, ат, ханаут, Бельгия.

sm.from 1150 to 1155: mai le 1150 e o'o I le 1155

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem nació en 1126, en Chièvres, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Guy Widon DE CHIEVRES, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Ada D'ATH, tenía 11123 años. Se casó con Gilles de Ribemont, Seigneur de Berlaimont aproximadamente 1130. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1176, en Ghislenghien, Hainaut, Bélgica, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Ghislenghien, Ath, Hainaut, Bélgica.
